title: French Dressing
writer: Adelaide Heilbron, Pauline Forney, J.L. Campbell
actors: H.B. Warner, Clive Brook, Lois Wilson
plot: Philip and Cynthia Grey are a pair of recently-wed Bostonians, and Cynthia is properly Back-Bay no-action quiet and dowdy, and Philip resigns himself to the quietness (no action) regularity of their home. But then along comes a bl...
